description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeve, button-up shirt with a subtle pattern, paired with slim pants and a visible belt at the waist. The figure wears low-profile shoes with a simple design, and the overall attire suggests a casual, urban style suitable for city environments. The face is stylized with simplified features, and the hair is short and neatly styled, covering the ears and forehead. The proportions and posture are realistic, with natural limb lengths and a balanced stance. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a modern, everyday look.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing a patterned shirt, slim pants, and low-profile shoes, with short, neat hair and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, shirt, pants, and shoes, with arms extended and no visible facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side seam of the shirt and pants, and the shoe's outline.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, shirt buttons, belt, and the overall fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with similar details as the left side, including the arm and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve button-up shirt and slim pants with a belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, straight hair with a neat, rounded shape
